sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Dinosaur Riding
special_mechanics.description: Four rideable dinosaur companions with distinct physics properties

physics_values.red_camptosaurus: fire breathing, lava swimming until limit

special_mechanics.name: Underwater Stages
special_mechanics.description: Stages featuring underwater mechanics; only elasmosaurus survives

special_mechanics.name: Skateboard
special_mechanics.description: Vehicle for traversal that does not carry to next stage

special_mechanics.name: Ice Sliding
special_mechanics.description: Blue camptosaurus can walk on ice without sliding; normal character slides

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Only qualitative gameplay mechanics documented. No precise physics values available. Sources describe game features and dinosaur abilities but contain no movement parameters, gravity values, or jump physics data.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Adventure Island II disambiguation page
